mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO backtest_daily_summary ( task_id, trade_date, next_trade_date, top_k, cost_bps, selected_count, avg_gross_return_bps, avg_cost_bps, avg_net_return_bps, win_flag, best_stock_code, best_stock_return_bps, worst_stock_code, worst_stock_return_bps, created_at ) VALUES
( #{item.taskId}, #{item.tradeDate}, #{item.nextTradeDate}, #{item.topK}, #{item.costBps}, #{item.selectedCount}, #{item.avgGrossReturnBps}, #{item.avgCostBps}, #{item.avgNetReturnBps}, #{item.winFlag}, #{item.bestStockCode}, #{item.bestStockReturnBps}, #{item.worstStockCode}, #{item.worstStockReturnBps}, #{item.createdAt} )
